content: cudarc latest 0.19.8 (published 2026-06-19, ~300k+ downloads/version, very active). Safe minimal CUDA bindings: driver API, NVRTC (runtime compile CUDA C to PTX), cuBLAS, cuBLASLt, cuDNN, cuRAND. Three layers per API: safe/result/sys. Supports CUDA 11.4-11.8, 12.0-12.9, 13.0. Builds for x86_64-pc-windows-msvc (native Windows). dynamic-load/dynamic-link/static-link options. Kernels authored as CUDA C strings compiled at runtime via NVRTC, or precompiled PTX/cubin loaded via driver API.
